title: Curse of Strahd
synopsis: A gothic horror adventure set in the dread domain of Barovia. A mysterious mist draws you into the realm of Strahd von Zarovich, vampire lord, where hope is a scarce commodity and every shadow conceals danger.
opening_narration:
A thick, unnatural fog rolls in around your boots. One moment you were walking a familiar road; the next, the world has changed. The trees around you are gnarled and grey, their bare branches clawing at a sky the color of a bruise. The air smells of damp earth and something older — decay, perhaps, or the memory of it.

Ahead, through the mist, you can make out the shape of a village. A wooden sign above the gate reads: BAROVIA. From somewhere within, you hear the sound of a child weeping.
setting: Barovia, a dread domain surrounded by impenetrable mist. Gothic castles, haunted villages, dark forests, and fog-choked valleys.

npcs.name: Strahd von Zarovich
npcs.description: The vampire lord of Barovia. Ancient, cunning, and obsessed.

npcs.name: Ireena Kolyana
npcs.description: A young woman in Barovia who bears an uncanny resemblance to Strahd's lost love.

npcs.name: Madam Eva
npcs.description: An ancient Vistani seer who can read your fate in the Tarokka cards.

special_rules: This is a horror adventure — tension and dread are constant
Strahd can appear at any time
The Tarokka card reading determines key item locations
